projects.name: RunAI Coach
projects.vision: AI-native iOS приложение за бягане — реално-време гласов coaching, injury prediction, adaptive планове. Revenue target: $30k за 10-30 дни → $100k за 6 мес.

phases.name: Phase 1: Research & Design
phases.summary: Конкурентен анализ (Runna, Strava, Nike Run Club). ICP дефиниран. Free vs Pro модел.

phases.name: Phase 2: Prototype
phases.summary: Prototype v5.0 — 40 екрана (от 25 в v3.0). Quick Run, Countdown, AI Chat, PRs, Shoe Tracking, Safety/Live Share.

phases.name: Phase 3: Execution Plan
phases.summary: Execution Plan v2.0 — MVP = 28 екрана, 5 седмици. Free vs Pro матрица финализирана.

phases.name: Phase 4: MVP Development
phases.summary: SwiftUI + HealthKit + Apple Watch + Claude API. Нужен Mac за iOS development.
blockers: 🔴 Блокер #1: Mac достъп за Xcode/iOS development

phases.name: Phase 5: Beta Testing
phases.summary: TestFlight beta с 50-100 бегачи. Iterate по feedback.

phases.name: Phase 6: App Store Launch
phases.summary: ASO, marketing, launch campaign. Revenue tracking.

blockers: 🔴 Mac достъп за iOS development (Xcode, SwiftUI, HealthKit)
nextActions: Осигури Mac достъп (Крис)
Setup Xcode project + HealthKit entitlements
Phase 4: MVP development start

Momerly: AsyncStorage → SecureStore fix push-нат.** Крис прати 4 crash report-а — всички SIGABRT от `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage` TurboModule на iOS 26 beta. AsyncStorage crash-ва при file operations (rename, getattrlist, NSSearchPathForDirectories) веднага при startup (~100-400ms). Fix: замених AsyncStorage с `expo-secure-store` (Keychain-based) в 3 файла (firebase.ts, useOnboarding.tsx, i18n/index.tsx). Махнат от package.json. TS чист. Commit `a61d19a`, push-нат. EAS build трябва да пусне Крис от Mac (нямаме EXPO_TOKEN на сървъра).

projects.name: ClawAI (OpenClaw as a Service)
projects.vision: AI асистенти за бизнеси — от подписване до live за 24ч. Два продукта: Starter (€28/мес, plug & play) и Clawsourcing (€550/мес, custom build).

phases.name: Phase 1: Research & Pricing
phases.summary: Конкурентен анализ (Felix Craft, Mahesha, Clawhosters). Pricing модел: 3 плана → 2 плана. Tech stack: Supabase + static HTML.

phases.name: Phase 2: Landing Page & Brand
phases.summary: ClawAI brand pivot. Двуезична landing page (BG/EN). Clawsourcing page. Обединение в една платформа.

phases.name: Phase 3: Database & Pipeline
phases.summary: Supabase: 17 таблици, RLS, миграция. Pipeline end-to-end: form → processor → handler → email. Два flow-а: Starter + Custom.

phases.name: Phase 4: Admin Dashboard
phases.summary: 1425 реда, 8 секции, login gate. Supabase-connected. PRIVATE repo след security incident.

phases.name: Phase 5: Stripe & Payments
phases.summary: Stripe backend на Vercel (clawai-stripe.vercel.app). Checkout: €28/мес + €280 setup. Webhook → Supabase → Telegram. Node 24 fix (native fetch). Success page.

phases.name: Phase 5b: Client Portal & Onboarding
phases.summary: GitHub Pages portal с 6-step onboarding wizard + status dashboard. Dark luxury тема, magic link auth → zero-email flow (Stripe→portal→auto-login→wizard). 10 код фиксове, 2 DB миграции, RLS policies. E2E 6/6, Playwright 14/14 PASS.

phases.name: Phase 6: Auto-Provisioning
phases.summary: DO API → Ansible → OpenClaw install → credentials → live. Provisioning Plan написан (knowledge/projects/clawai-provisioning-plan.md). Тиерове: Starter ($6, 1GB) default. Чака DO акаунт + скриптове от Крис.

phases.name: Phase 7: First Customer
phases.summary: Domain, SSL, production deploy. Първи платен клиент.

goals.text: End-to-end pipeline: форма → плащане → provisioning → live assistant
Landing page live с contact form

blockers: 🔴 Rotate Supabase JWT secret — чака Крис (security blocker still active as of 2026-04-06)
nextActions: Rotate Supabase JWT (Крис)
ClawHub акаунт + token за publishing/sync workflow
DO API provisioning скрипт (Phase 6)
Domain + SSL (Phase 7)

projects.name: Momerly
projects.vision: Мобилно приложение за реални връзки между майки в София — activities, messaging, map. Android + iOS.

phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation
phases.summary: Expo + Firebase setup, 14 Firestore колекции, Auth (phone OTP), CI/CD.

phases.name: Phase 2: Onboarding & Profile
phases.summary: 11-стъпков onboarding, photo upload, selfie verification queue, tags, profile CRUD.

phases.name: Phase 3: Connections & Messaging
phases.summary: Connection requests, state machine, block система, direct messaging (text only, 500 char), 10 chat limit.

phases.name: Phase 4: Activities & Events
phases.summary: Activity CRUD, group chat, late cancel tracking, events (admin), cron jobs за auto-complete.

phases.name: Phase 5: Home & Discovery
phases.summary: Home Pulse, Explore, Notifications, Cloud Functions. 12,656 LOC, 70+ файла.

phases.name: Phase 6: Admin Dashboard
phases.summary: Web admin panel — 5 sprints in 1 day. Sprint 1: Foundation + Verification Queue. Sprint 2: User Management. Sprint 3: Reports & Moderation. Sprint 4: Analytics + Action Logs. Sprint 5: Polish (responsive sidebar, toast notifications, code splitting, Firebase Hosting config, README, security rules). 1691+ lines added. TSC clean throughout.

phases.name: Phase 6b: iOS 26 Compatibility
phases.summary: iOS 26 crash investigation — Hermes PAC incompatibility (SIGABRT on Release builds). AsyncStorage→SecureStore migration. Link asChild→router.push (6 files). Firestore rules fix (messages subcollection + collection group). Activity form polish. Cloud Functions deployed (push notifs, connections, auto-complete). Dev build works on iOS 26. Waiting for Hermes PAC fix (RN 0.85 / Expo SDK 56, May-June 2026) for production.

phases.name: Phase 7: Polish & Launch
phases.summary: Edge case testing, i18n (BG+EN), App Store assets, Privacy Policy.

goals.text: MVP с всички core features (Activities, Messaging, Connections)

blockers: Release/TestFlight path on iOS remains blocked by Hermes runtime behavior; config-only jsEngine switches are not producing a real JSC binary.
Apple credentials / next EAS validation step still depend on Крис for final external test execution.
nextActions: Inspect generated native iOS build config / EAS behavior to understand why Hermes remains bundled despite jsEngine overrides.
Choose a non-Hermes validation path or framework-level workaround instead of relying on Expo config-only switches.
Phase 7: Polish & Launch — edge case testing, i18n, App Store assets, Privacy Policy
Deploy Admin Dashboard to Firebase Hosting
Cloud Functions already deployed — monitor push notifications in production
